ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Standard abbreviation for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the country's flag image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the competition took place */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the sports event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the competition took place */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participating countries */,
  "total_medals_awarded" INTEGER /* Total number of medals awarded in the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participating country */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final rank of the country in the competition */,
  "participating_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams the country had participating */,
  "participation_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total teams the country's teams represent */,
  "total_athletes" INTEGER /* Total number of athletes the country sent to the competition */,
  "male_athletes" INTEGER /* Number of male athletes */,
  "female_athletes" INTEGER /* Number of female athletes */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the athletes */,
  "youngest_athlete" INTEGER /* Age of the youngest athlete */,
  "oldest_athlete" INTEGER /* Age of the oldest athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participation record */,
  "goals_played" INTEGER /* Total goals played by the country's teams */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the country's teams */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the country's teams */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the country's teams */,
  "gold_medals" INTEGER /* Number of gold medals won by the country */,
  "silver_medals" INTEGER /* Number of silver medals won by the country */,
  "bronze_medals" INTEGER /* Number of bronze medals won by the country */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the country's teams */,
  "total_goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the country's teams */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between goals played and goals conceded */,
  "total_records_broken" INTEGER /* Number of records broken by the country's athletes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_participation_id FOREIGN KEY ("participation_id") REFERENCES participation ("participation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, statistician, public) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country featured in the report */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition covered by the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., historical performance, trend analysis) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the report for easy search and retrieval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country featured in the visualization */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition covered by the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization image or document */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the visualization */,
  "interactive" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the visualization is interactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)
